forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 56. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

forecast.name: Thursday
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly sunny. High near 64, with temperatures falling to around 62 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 7 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.

weather_report:
In Downtown San Francisco, the night unfolds with a gentle embrace of clouds hovering over a city steeped in tranquility. The temperature whispers a comfort in the mid-fifties, while a soft southwest breeze plays a subtle tune as it weaves through the streets. As dawn approaches, the clouds will gradually part to reveal a partly sunny day, painting warmth upon the landscape. Expected highs inch toward the mid-sixties, but as the afternoon sets in, the coolness will creep in, slipping back to the lower sixties. 

The horizon, characterized by the iconic Golden Gate Bridge, hints at lingering marine layers, casting a shroud that may blend the coastline seamlessly with the sky. Today, as you prepare for the hours ahead, layer your attire wisely; a light jacket will serve as a comforting layer against the cool winds, while a simple shirt underneath will keep you comfortable once the sun makes its appearance. Take a stroll along one of the waterfront parks, perhaps venture into a cozy café where the aroma of freshly brewed coffee beckons, or lose yourself in the charm of a local bookstore enveloped in the quietude of a summer's day.
